brief_html: This is sent from the client to the host to send a message to the other clients.
format:
(UINT8) Total

For each total:
(UINT8) To player number
(UINT8) From player number
(UINT8) Flags

For Flag 0x10:
   (STRING) Message
For Flag 0x11:
   (UINT8) Team
For Flag 0x12:
   (UINT8) Color
For Flag 0x13:
   (UINT8) Race
For Flag 0x14:
   (UINT8) Handicap
For Flag 0x20:
   (UINT32) Extra Flags
   (STRING) Message
remarks_html: This is sent from the client to the host to send a message to the other clients.
